---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for OpenAdapter
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case
What problem does this solve? How would you use it?

**Example:** "I want to use OpenAdapter with OpenClaw's tool calling features..."

## Proposed Solution
How do you think this should work?

## Alternatives Considered
Are there workarounds or alternative approaches you've considered?

## OpenClaw Integration
Does this feature relate to OpenClaw integration? If yes, which OpenClaw skills/features would it enable?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples.

## Would You Like to Contribute?
- [ ] I'd like to work on this feature
- [ ] I can help test this feature
- [ ] I just want to suggest it
